recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana tell you about the bookstore hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana said our bookstore opens at nine sharp.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I think Mariana mentioned a conference on linguistics.
recent_60_samples.answer: When does Olivia leave for our conference?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finally try Hector's homemade dumplings?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hector said our new spice blend was perfect.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear what Margot decided about the mixer?
recent_60_samples.answer: Margot needed to know if my venue is booked.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the lab partnership?
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian hasn't told me whether the lab opens tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Alison ask you after the poster session?
recent_60_samples.answer: Alison wondered if you took the printed handouts.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you skip the budget meeting yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, Juan needed help moving into his apartment.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where can you pick up the new student handbooks?
recent_60_samples.answer: Your handbooks were quietly left at the front desk by Naomi this morning.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you met Diane, the new graduate TA?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yeah, Diane currently runs the study sessions that I joined last week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard Professor Cho announced a new research scholarship.
recent_60_samples.answer: Did Angelina submit our grant application on time?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you heading to the library now?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yes, I need to find out if it closes early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sleep well before your big exam?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, I barely slept at all last night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your day trip downtown go well?
recent_60_samples.answer: It rained on us the entire afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you tried the new coffee cart yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yes, they always brew it really fresh.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just moved into the north dorm building.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I drop off my outgoing mail?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish the chemistry problem set?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not started the last section yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you skip the morning seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: The bus that I take broke down again.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the advisor tell you this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the transfer form that I submitted was complete.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you joining us at the gym later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I was wondering whether the pool is open tonight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you pick up your lab goggles today?
recent_60_samples.answer: The supply desk had already closed by the time my class ended.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your roommate say about dinner?
recent_60_samples.answer: He found out the dining hall closes early.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your group project meetings change rooms?
recent_60_samples.answer: We moved them to the quiet study room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you registered for the spring courses?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked whether my enrollment slot opens next Tuesday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you enjoy the guest lecture yesterday?
recent_60_samples.answer: The professor explained the topic very clearly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the printing lab just got upgraded.
recent_60_samples.answer: Do you know when it reopens for students?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you like the cafeteria menu today?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, the tomato soup was the best part.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your package finally show up today?
recent_60_samples.answer: It was left at the front desk earlier.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for tomorrow's class presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: No, I have not rehearsed my slides yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian mention about renewals?
recent_60_samples.answer: She said the reference books that I borrowed last week are already overdue.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you decide on a research topic yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked the subject that the grant funds.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you catch Margot before class today?
recent_60_samples.answer: She's left a note on your desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you tried Angelina's new cafe yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: Juan says it's a really great latte.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I haven't heard back from Harold in admin.
recent_60_samples.answer: Emma asked whether my transfer was approved.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Julian tell you why the lab is locked?
recent_60_samples.answer: Hector reset the keypad code late last night.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Matthew told me the gym moved upstairs.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which floor has the new weight machines?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you sign up for Professor Cho's seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: I've grabbed a seat off the waitlist.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Alison send you the shuttle schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: Mariana found out it runs every hour.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to Diane's recital tonight?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't picked up my ticket yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to your advisor today?
recent_60_samples.answer: Olivia recommended the writing elective that fills up before everyone registers.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you checked the bulletin board lately?
recent_60_samples.answer: Naomi asked whether the keynote was moved for repairs.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you coming to the study group later?
recent_60_samples.answer: I'll meet you at the library entrance.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you like the lecture this afternoon?
recent_60_samples.answer: Yes, the professor explained the topic very well.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you miss our morning seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: My bus broke down and I'm late now.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Mariana ask you about the trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the morning bus leaves before eight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to your advisor about courses?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked if the elective still has open seats.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you check the museum hours for us?
recent_60_samples.answer: I found out the museum opens at noon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the gym added new equipment.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which floor has the new rowing machines?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just transferred here this semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I find the registration office?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you nervous about the writing workshop?
recent_60_samples.answer: I wondered if Emma had any feedback yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you ready for tomorrow's presentation?
recent_60_samples.answer: I haven't rehearsed the final slides yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get the material you missed today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I borrowed Olivia's notes for the morning lecture.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get your money back for the cancelled trip?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not received the refund yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the chemistry lab was closed for repairs.
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked Mariana whether the lab reopened today.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I can't find where Hector put the handouts.
recent_60_samples.answer: You can find Hector's notes in the study room.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You'll need your ID card for the final exam.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I pick up my student ID?

recent_60_samples.prompt: I think the seminar schedule changed this week.
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian asked when the evening seminar starts.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you all signed up for fall classes?
recent_60_samples.answer: Unfortunately, I missed the early registration deadline.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm really struggling with this stats course.
recent_60_samples.answer: Diane recommended the tutor who explains the statistics homework very clearly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you ever sort out the lab grade problem?
recent_60_samples.answer: I emailed Harold about the missing lab results.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Do you think the debate club takes first-timers?
recent_60_samples.answer: I asked Naomi whether the debate club accepts beginners.
